rationale: The citing paper’s first application uses IRI CPG household choice data during the Great Recession and reports implications for own-price elasticity estimates, while the cited paper is a major IRI CPG study on how price elasticity varies with economic growth across categories. This creates a plausible substantive link (motivation/comparison context on elasticity dynamics), but the evidence provided is only a DOI-level reference match with no local citation text showing how it is used.
